title: aristotelia fruticosa
intro: Aristotelia fruticosa, also known as the New Zealand pepper tree or makomako, is a small to medium-sized tree native to New Zealand. The leaves and berries of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aristotelia fruticosa include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve symptoms of arthritis, and reduce inflammation. Aristotelia fruticosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the berries being particularly valued for their flavor and medicinal properties.
